_meta.description: Feature selection configuration for DPDP Compliance Checker preprocessing pipeline.

gate_definitions.LEGAL: Field mandated by a specific DPDP section or associated Indian regulation. Cannot be dropped.
gate_definitions.LOGIC: Field required as input to agent detection logic. Dropping it breaks the agent reasoning chain.
gate_definitions.GATE_3_CANDIDATE: Field pending Gate 3 correlation analysis. Held through pilot run. Not yet decided.
gate_definitions.DROP: Field failed all gates. No DPDP section, no agent logic, no ML utility. Excluded before redaction.

action_definitions.KEEP: Retain as-is. Non-PII categorical, boolean, or numeric field.
action_definitions.HASH: Replace with HMAC-SHA256 12-char digest keyed by (tenant_id + salt). Preserves FK joins.
action_definitions.TRUNCATE_DATE: Retain date component only. Strip time-of-day — not needed for any compliance check.
action_definitions.BUCKET: Replace exact count with categorical band. Exact values unnecessary for agent logic.
action_definitions.DROP: Exclude entirely. Column will not appear in redacted dataset or database.

customer_id.reason: Primary key — must remain joinable across all tables via HMAC. Direct ID never stored.

tenant_id.reason: Multi-tenant scoping key. Not a personal identifier.

name.reason: No DPDP section requires evaluating a customer name. No agent logic consumes it. High PII, zero compliance utility.

dob.reason: is_minor is derived from dob and stored as a first-class boolean. Raw dob not needed once is_minor is set. DPDP S.9 requires the flag, not the raw date.

age.reason: Derived field. Computable from dob. Storing both creates inconsistency risk. is_minor boolean replaces all compliance uses.

gender.reason: No DPDP section requires evaluating gender. Sensitive attribute with zero detection utility at Level 1.

email.reason: Communication channel only. No compliance detection function. PII with no gate.

phone.reason: Communication channel only. Same as email.

address.reason: High-sensitivity PII with zero compliance detection utility. Not referenced by any rule.

country.reason: Required for NRI/OCI/PIO classification and cross-border transfer rule branching. DPDP Chapter V.

kyc_status.reason: RBI prohibits processing for unverified customers. Expired KYC is a violation trigger.

account_status.reason: Processing on closed accounts is a S.8(7) violation. Needed by Regulation Agent.

is_minor.reason: DPDP S.9 first-class flag. Minor accounts require guardian consent. Cannot be computed at query time once dob is dropped.

data_principal_type.reason: NRI/OCI/PIO type drives rule branching in Regulation Agent for cross-border checks.

created_at.reason: Account age needed for temporal analysis. Time-of-day not required.

consent_id.reason: Primary key and FK in transaction_events. Must remain joinable via HMAC.

customer_id.reason: FK to customer_master. Hashed with same salt — joins preserved.

consent_status.reason: DPDP S.6 — primary signal for consent validity check (DPDP-001 S1).

consent_timestamp.reason: Required to establish consent lifecycle timeline. Time-of-day stripped.

expiry_timestamp.reason: DPDP S.6(3) — stale consent detection requires expiry date (DPDP-001 S2).

withdrawal_timestamp.reason: DPDP S.6(4) — withdrawal timestamp is the legal anchor for when processing must cease.

consented_purpose.reason: DPDP S.6(1) — compared against processing_purpose for purpose-limitation check (DPDP-001 S3, DPDP-002 S1).

consent_version.reason: Outdated consent version is a violation trigger (DPDP-002 S2). Policy changes may invalidate old consents.

notice_provided.reason: DPDP S.5 — notice before data collection is a legal requirement (DPDP-004 S1).

is_bundled.reason: DPDP S.6(2) — bundled consent is explicitly void. Direct violation signal (DPDP-001 S4).

consent_channel.reason: Channel determines whether adequate notice could have been delivered (DPDP-004 S2).

guardian_consent_id.reason: DPDP S.9 — absence of guardian consent for a minor is a critical violation (DPDP-005 S2).

event_id.reason: Primary key for audit trail. Must be uniquely identifiable.

consent_id.reason: DPDP S.6 — links processing event to authorising consent. NULL value is itself a violation signal.

event_type.reason: Candidate: certain event types correlate with processing violations. Gate 3 pending.

processing_purpose.reason: DPDP S.4(1)(b) and S.6(1) — compared against consented_purpose for purpose-limitation check.

timestamp.reason: Temporal reasoning — was consent valid at time of processing. Date precision sufficient.

shared_with_third_party.reason: DPDP S.8(2) — third-party sharing without DPA is a direct violation (DPDP-006 S1).

third_party_id.reason: FK to system_inventory. Risk Agent uses this to verify DPA exists for receiving processor.

is_cross_border.reason: DPDP Chapter V — cross-border transfers trigger additional obligations (DPDP-015 S1).

transfer_country.reason: DPDP S.16 — destination country evaluated against approved list (DPDP-015 S2).

amount.reason: Financial metric. No DPDP compliance function. No gate applies.

device_id.reason: Fraud detection feature — no DPDP compliance function at Level 1. Also PII under DPDP.

ip_address.reason: Network forensics — no DPDP compliance function at Level 1. PII under DPDP S.2(t).

employee_id.reason: Hashed for privacy. Preserved for per-employee access pattern analysis.

employee_role.reason: Primary input for unauthorised access detection. DPDP-013 S1.

accessed_pii.reason: Boolean confirming PII was exposed in this event. DPDP-013 S2.

pii_fields_accessed.reason: Proportionality check — was access scoped to the role's legitimate PII set.

access_reason.reason: Validates that stated business reason is consistent with role. DPDP-013 logic.

access_outcome.reason: Denied attempts are security signals. DPDP-013 S3.

data_volume_accessed.reason: Candidate: bulk access anomaly detection. Gate 3 pending.

timestamp.reason: After-hours and post-account-closure access detection requires date.

data_category.reason: Different categories have different retention mandates (PMLA=5yr, IT Act=6yr). DPDP S.8(7).

retention_expiry_date.reason: DPDP S.8(7) primary retention violation input. DPDP-003 S1.

retention_status.reason: State machine for retention lifecycle. DPDP-003 S2, DPDP-010 S3.

purpose_completed.reason: DPDP S.8(7) — one of two deletion triggers. DPDP-011 S1.

erasure_requested.reason: DPDP S.13 rights check trigger. DPDP-010 S1.

erasure_timestamp.reason: SLA clock anchor for erasure request compliance.

legal_hold_flag.reason: Prevents false violation alerts for data legitimately under legal hold.

erasure_request_source.reason: Distinguishes S.13 user-initiated requests from S.8(7) system-triggered deletion.

data_retained.reason: Ambiguous boolean replaced by retention_status ENUM. Redundant and inconsistency-prone.

pii_encrypted.reason: DPDP S.8(4) minimum security safeguard check. DPDP-008 S1.

encryption_type.reason: Algorithm adequacy check. AES-256 required minimum. DPDP-008 S3.

breach_detected.reason: DPDP S.8(6) notification obligation trigger. DPDP-014 S1.

breach_timestamp.reason: CERT-In notification clock starts at confirmation. DPDP-014 S3.

notification_delay.reason: Direct violation metric — exceeding 72h threshold is DPDP-014 S2. Exact value required.

affected_user_count.reason: DPDP Schedule penalty scale computation. Bucketed: minimal/moderate/large/critical.

data_categories_breached.reason: Breach severity classification. Aadhaar breach categorically more severe than email breach.

security_audit_flag.reason: Foreseeable-and-preventable assessment. Aggravating factor under DPDP penalty schedule.

request_type.reason: DPDP S.11/12/13 — different rights have different SLA and obligation profiles.

submitted_at.reason: SLA clock starts here. DPDP-010 S2.

acknowledged_at.reason: Time-to-acknowledge is an operational compliance signal.

sla_due_date.reason: Computed as submitted_date + 30 days. Explicit field prevents re-computation errors.

sla_breached.reason: Primary violation flag for rights compliance. DPDP-010 S2.

fulfilled_at.reason: Used to compute whether fulfilment occurred before or after SLA.

fulfillment_status.reason: State of rights request. Stuck-in-pending is a systemic violation pattern.

rejection_reason.reason: Audit Agent validates whether rejection reason is a legitimate ground under DPDP S.13(3).

tenant_id.reason: Primary key. Anchor for all FK relationships.

grievance_endpoint_available.reason: DPDP S.14 direct compliance check. DPDP-009 S1.

data_protection_officer_assigned.reason: DPDP S.10 SDF obligation. Governance gap signal. DPDP-009 S2.

dpo_contact_email.reason: Masked to first char + domain. Reachability of grievance mechanism. DPDP-009 S3.
dpo_contact_email.note: Mask pattern: first_char + *** + @domain. Applied during redaction, not dropped.

audit_frequency.reason: String field — not machine-readable. Replaced by audit_frequency_days integer.

audit_frequency_days.reason: Machine-readable audit cadence. DPDP-012 S1 — days since last audit vs this value.

last_audit_date.reason: Required to compute audit overdue status. Without this audit_frequency_days has no reference.

risk_level.reason: Tenant risk classification affects severity multiplier in risk scoring model.

system_id.reason: Primary key. Referenced as third_party_hash FK in transaction_events.

system_name.reason: Identifies the system for audit reporting.

system_type.reason: System classification affects which rules apply.

pii_stored.reason: Determines whether system is in DPDP scope. DPDP S.2(t). DPDP-016 S3.

encryption_enabled.reason: DPDP S.8(4) security safeguard check at system level. DPDP-008 S2.

access_control_enabled.reason: Role-based access control is minimum safeguard under DPDP S.8(4).

data_processor_type.reason: Internal vs third-party classification drives DPA requirement check. DPDP S.8(2).

dpa_signed.reason: DPDP S.8(2) mandatory DPA check. Absence is direct violation. DPDP-016 S1.

dpa_expiry_date.reason: Expired DPA is legally equivalent to no DPA. DPDP-016 S2.

third_party_integrations.reason: Documents undocumented data flows — potential unauthorised processing signals.

policy_type.reason: Classifies policy so agents can retrieve applicable policy for each rule check.

policy_value.reason: Free-text field — not machine-readable. Replaced by policy_value_numeric + policy_value_unit.

policy_value_numeric.reason: Machine-readable policy value for rule engine comparison. Always paired with unit.

policy_value_unit.reason: Unit context for numeric value — days/months/years/hours. Required for correct comparison.

effective_date.reason: Determines which policy version governed a historical event.

last_updated.reason: Most recent update date — used to identify current active version.

is_active.reason: Only active policy governs current compliance. Historical versions retained for backward audit.
